title: phoenicanthemum terrestre
intro: Phoenicanthemum terrestre, also known as the desert lavender or four o'clock plant, is a flowering plant species in the family Nyctaginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phoenicanthemum terrestre include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress, as well as its potential to improve sleep quality. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can be made by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water.
